text:

Author: jsm

Log:
  New port editors/featherpad

  FeatherPad is a lightweight Qt5 plain-text editor. It is independent of
  any desktop environment.

  PR: 229314
  Approved by: swills (mentor)
  Differential Revision: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D17736
